scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const f='public/hot';if(fs.existsSync(f)){fs.unlinkSync(f);console.log('Removed stale hot file');}else{console.log('No hot file found');}"
scripts.start: npm run clean && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "VITE,LARAVEL" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "npm run dev" "php artisan serve"
